title: cyclosorus microlonchus
intro: Cyclosorus microlonchus, also known as the small-scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus microlonchus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal supplements, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
